message:
fix(gui): add fallback clear pass and extract testable WebGPU surface config helpers

WebGPU rendering improvements in frankenterm-gui:

draw.rs:
  - Add fallback clear render pass when no draw batches populate a frame.
    Without this, presenting an encoder with zero render passes can leave
    stale contents on the wgpu surface, causing visual artifacts or
    flickering when the terminal has no visible content to render.

webgpu.rs:
  - Extract select_surface_format() — chooses sRGB variant of the first
    available format when present, matching previous inline logic
  - Extract select_surface_view_formats() — returns sRGB/non-sRGB pair
    only when the driver supports SURFACE_VIEW_FORMATS downlevel flag
  - Extract select_composite_alpha_mode() — prefers PostMultiplied over
    PreMultiplied over Auto, matching previous inline logic
  - Refactor WebGpuState::new to use the three extracted helpers,
    reducing nesting and improving readability
  - Add 4 unit tests covering: sRGB format preference, fallback to first
    format, view format gating on driver capability, and alpha mode
    priority ordering (Post > Pre > Auto)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
